rationale.completeness: The PR addresses all core requirements: webhook endpoint, message parsing, inbound/outbound handling, config schema, session management via chat ID, and comprehensive tests. Minor gaps include hardcoded port and simplified webhook path matching.
rationale.correctness: The implementation is technically sound with proper validation, error handling, and API calls. Minor issues exist: webhook path fallback to 'default' account could fail if no default exists, and the HTTP server startup logic could be clearer.
rationale.style: Code follows TypeScript conventions, uses JSDoc comments, matches the existing WhatsApp plugin pattern, and maintains consistent naming. Some inconsistency between debug.log and console.log usage.
rationale.quality: Well-organized with good separation of concerns (inbound, outbound, types, plugin), comprehensive test coverage, and excellent README documentation. Minor improvements possible in HTTP server initialization and factory patterns.
